item.title: Is Travis Kelce Returning? Chiefs HC Andy Reid Says There's Been 'Communication'
item.description: Travis Kelce has been in communication with the Chiefs about a possible return, while head coach Andy Reid said the team hasn't had any discussions ye...

item.title: Saquon Barkley: New Eagles OC Sean Mannion's System Is 'Refreshing'
item.description: After watching his numbers take a dip in 2025, Eagles RB Saquon Barkley is excited for 2026 season, thanks to new OC Sean Mannion.

item.title: NFL Wide Receiver Rondale Moore Found Dead at 25 Years Old
item.description: Authorities say NFL wide receiver Rondale Moore has been found dead in Indiana.

item.title: 2026 NASCAR Odds: Elliott, Blaney, Logano Favored in Atlanta
item.description: Will Christopher Bell get into Victory Lane again at Atlanta's spring race, or will another driver take the checkered flag? Here are the odds.

item.title: How To Bet This Week in the NBA: Cavs-Thunder, Celtics-Lakers, More
item.description: Check out what to know about the best games from this week's NBA slate, including Cavs-Thunder and Celtics-Lakers.
